description: Style note This kurti by diva is designed to accentuate your femininity, combining traditional prints with a modern silhouette. Look stylish in this ethnic kurti and revel in the comfort of the soft fabric. Pair it with leggings and heels for a formal look or wear it with denims and flats for an off-duty look .Product detailsBeige printed kurti with green stiched detailing on the yoke, has V neck, three quarter sleeves, traditional orange and green floral print and ethnic artwork at the hem.Material and careBlended fabric Dry clean only Size and Fit Regular fitThe model (height 5'8” and chest 33”) is wearing size S
